source: planalto federal HTML (stopgap: IA raw items not yet published; see ADR-0011/0012)
annotation_method: llm_subagents(shard-per-doc) -> deterministic sequential-cursor offset resolution -> opf_annotate.validate
known_limitations: tiny v0 seed (6 docs) to lock the ontology + prove the subagent pipeline; scale by feeding more docs through the same flow
single fonte (federal/planalto) — stratification across fontes pending IA raw publication
clean official text, not OCR _djvu.txt: lacks OCR noise the production OPF will see (PT-BR distribution caveat, ADR-0012 warning 1)
